description_long: This is a plush, red stuffed toy shaped like a bear with a rounded body and limbs. Its face features two large, round white eyes with black pupils and a small black nose, giving it a simple and friendly appearance. The toy has two rounded ears on top of its head and a large, oval-shaped white patch on its belly. The surface appears to be made of a soft, ribbed fabric, and the toy is likely filled with a lightweight stuffing material. The back of the toy is plain red with no additional markings or features. This toy is designed to be cuddly and approachable, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments such as parks or playgrounds.
description: A red, plush bear-shaped stuffed toy with a white belly patch and large, round eyes. It has a soft, ribbed fabric surface and a friendly, simple appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, white belly patch, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the rounded limbs.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain red surface and the shape of the ears and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the curvature of the body and limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with wide, round eyes and a small, closed mouth. The features give the toy a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs bent forward. The head is positioned straight above the body.
